title: Master's Usage Addition
description: Adding usage to some minerals to make tools out of them.
body:
If you want to try this mod on an open-source rendition of Minecraft - I also made this mod for Minetest, check it out here:

[Here a link to Minetest mod](https://content.minetest.net/packages/MasterLife1997/usage_addition/)



Let's start with Ruby, I didn't want to just add another ore, so you can create Ruby like this:

![Crafting Ruby](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/602c204bdb0411a4b3247de02f08c1be4a9175c6.png)

With Ruby you can make Ruby Block (recipe is obvious), as well as Ruby tools:

![Creating Ruby Hoe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b09706104acf025df2a7097f69548d2d37c8c2a.png)

Ruby tools can be used instead of Diamond tools in a Smithing table to get netherite tools:

![Creating Netherite Hoe from Ruby Hoe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34bd7cfb380c047ae059206f0f8e7f48576bbf4b.png)

I also added other tools, here are examples:

Flint tools:

![Creating Flint Hoe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/390e2eadc2f1ad17b54839c86f79bbb4ca050cde.png)

Copper tools:

![Creating Copper Hoe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd523882deb05c56b2d8ac2f75e08d48575b0559.png)

Quartz tools:

![Creating Quartz Hoe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9976336507640f92f152e5b1108b74c531d14df2.png)

And that's pretty much it, I made this mod purely to test making mods in Fabric for Minecraft and in .lua for Minetest. I won't update it and feel free to use the mod or parts of it.
